content: (The location is now Frigid Cave.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Ancient Frost Troll, Frea, Lydia, Dragon Priest) (Serana has entered combat with Ancient Frost Troll) (Serana has entered combat with Ancient Frost Troll)
Serana: Oh, look at this frosty brute—bet he's got more ice in his veins than Dibella's chastity belt. Time to thaw you out with a little lightning foreplay!
Wounded Woman: Please, help me! That beast... it ambushed us, and the priest's curses are everywhere in this frozen hell.
Serana: This cave's got more mood lighting than a Volkihar orgy—pity the troll's crashing the party. Hold still, darling, I'll zap this furball before it turns you into a popsicle.
Wounded Woman: The water's so cold it bites like fangs... that priest, he summoned this monster from the depths. If you can heal me, I'll fight by your side—I've got sparks left in me yet.

(Serana is no longer in combat.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Frea, Lydia, Dragon Priest) (MJR fired an arrow.) (MJR unequipped Daedric Arrow) (MJR dropped/gave Daedric Arrow) (MJR equipped Daedric Arrow) (Serana has entered combat with Ancient Frost Troll) (Ancient Frost Troll was killed by the group) (Serana is no longer in combat) (MJR picked up / took Nirnroot from Lilethys) (MJR equipped Nirnroot) (MJR dropped/gave Nirnroot) (MJR cast the spell / consumed Nirnroot) (MJR picked up / took Lilethys' Journal Scrap from Lilethys) (Serana unequipped Dwarven Mace)
